class.name: planner/ReedsSheppPlanner
class.description: Reeds-Shepp path planner for Ackermann robots. Plans the minimum-length forward+reverse arc/straight path from start pose to goal pose, respecting a configurable minimum turning radius. Outputs a dense waypoint sequence (nav_msgs/Path) suitable for RPP.

class.name: nav2_straightline_planner/StraightLine
class.description: Straight-line interpolation planner for swath following.
